---
title: "test_scout_targets_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_scout_targets_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.88
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.10
---

## Intent
The `test_scout_targets_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_scout_generates_queue. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_scout_generates_queue. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [scripts.scout_targets](file://scripts.scout_targets)

### Exports
- `test_scout_generates_queue`
